name: Transition-Related Potentials as Markers of Narrative Comprehension in Continuous EEG

description: arXiv:2607.20720v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Harnessing the potential of electroencephalography (EEG) for brain research is fundamentally limited by intrinsic noise and the diffuse projection of brain-generated activity over the scalp. The standard event-related potential (ERP) paradigm addresses this limitation by relying on repeated independent trials, albeit at the cost of moving away f...
author: B\'alint Csan\'ady, P\'eter Vedres, Krist\'of Zsolt Mak\'o, Orsolya Papp-Zipernovszky, M\'arta Volosin, D\'avid Apagyi, Andr\'as Luk\'acs, Andr\'as B\'alint Kov\'acs, Zoltan Nadasdy
